metadata.description: Curated Copilot CLI plugins for Intel internal tooling — HSD sighting management and Microsoft Teams integration.

plugins.name: hsd-update
plugins.description: Read and update HSD (Hardware Sighting Database) articles via the HSD REST API with Kerberos/SSPI authentication.

plugins.name: my-teams-messages
plugins.description: Retrieve your own Microsoft Teams messages from chats and channels using Graph Search API with MSAL device-code authentication.
